name: Mismatching selector
description: A workload selector that does not match its pod template labels can prevent the controller from managing the intended pods. This usually results from label drift or copy-paste mistakes.
remediation: Update spec.selector.matchLabels or spec.template.metadata.labels so the selector labels match the pod template labels.
test: Check that every Deployment, ReplicaSet, DaemonSet, and StatefulSet selector matches the workload pod template labels.
